description:
A lazydocker-inspired TUI dashboard for managing WSL Linux containers via wslc.exe

lazywslc is a lazydocker-inspired terminal UI dashboard for managing WSL Linux
containers via wslc.exe. It provides a three-panel layout for Containers, Images
and Volumes, live CPU/memory sparkline graphs, a combined logs and stats view,
mouse and keyboard support, context actions (start/stop/kill/remove/prune) and
auto-refresh.
